text:
HOOK is a Japanese fashion brand that held a collaboration with the Hunter × Hunter series.

Information

The first collaboration merchandise was released on October 3rd, 2022.

Collaboration Characters

Gon Freecss
Killua Zoldyck
Kurapika
Leorio Paradinight
Chrollo Lucilfer
Hisoka Morow
Phantom Troupe
Meruem
Komugi
